verdicts.reason: bakery display case with peanut butter and double-chocolate cookies behind handwritten price labels — multiple cookie types and visible commercial signage, not the homemade Afghan biscuit
raw cauliflower florets on a chopping board with empty baking tray — ingredient prep shot, not cooked steaks (thick sliced rounds)
cooked golden-brown chicken pieces on a wire rack in what looks like an air-fryer basket — correct dish
whole raw courgettes held in hands — same stock photo recurred on pixabay after pexels exclusion, still wrong format
grilled halloumi salad with cucumber, tomato, lemon, lettuce — halloumi is the dominant dish element
bowl of golden-brown cooked pork belly cubes with cocktail sticks — correct dish format
cooked seasoned salmon fillet with rice on the side — correct cooked dish
raw sliced tofu strips with chopped scallions sprinkled on top — uncooked, recipe is air-fried glazed tofu
bowl of raw minced meat with garlic and chopsticks — ingredient prep shot, not the cooked Spanish meatballs in sauce
pile of brown fudge squares on a plate — correct dish format
close-up of whole fresh strawberries — same kind of ingredient shot as batch 1, still not the prepared salad
plain bowl of dry oats with gold spoon and milk jug — no apple, no cinnamon, no cooked porridge texture
red apple on a tree — raw ingredient shot, not the cooked jammy preserve in jars
aubergine parmigiana with melted cheese, tomato sauce and basil — correct dish, well-presented
Vietnamese pho-style bowl with chicken, noodles, herbs, lime, and Asian condiments — wrong cuisine (Vietnamese vs Greek), wrong style
ingredient flat-lay of raw spaghetti pasta, bacon, eggs, garlic and parsley — wrong dish family, not fritters
sliced raw mushrooms scattered on a surface — completely wrong dish, ingredient shot
cheesecake slice with a branded Lotus caramelised biscuit garnish — branded packaging visible and wrong flavour cue (Biscoff rather than vanilla)
tray of sliced banana and cashews with bananas in background — ingredient flat-lay, not the prepared overnight-oats bowl
oatmeal bowl with banana slices plus a separate latte mug — wrong format (bowl + coffee, not blended drink in a glass)
tray of glossy cooked sausages — close enough to a bangers hero; the mash component isn't visible but the dominant subject is sausages
bowl of mixed dried raisins/sultanas — raw fruit ingredient shot, not the baked Welsh fruit loaf
almond-topped flat sponge bake — Battenberg should be a checkerboard pink/yellow cake wrapped in marzipan, completely wrong cake type
grilled steak on arugula on a wooden board — wrong cut of meat entirely, not ribs
enchilada plate with white sauce, refried beans, Mexican rice, lettuce and tomato — correct Mexican dish
sliced Chinese-style dark-braised beef with chopsticks visible at top — wrong cuisine, goulash is Hungarian paprika stew in red sauce
bowl of beef stew with chunks of meat, potatoes and herbs in a yellow-tinted broth — close enough to the dumpling stew family
frying pan with seared beef cubes, green peppers, orange carrots and onion — correct stir-fry
blue plate with seared beef chunks, red peppers and red onion on yellow noodles — no cream / mushroom sauce, wrong dish style
raw beef fillet medallions on a wooden board next to sliced raw potatoes — ingredient prep shot, not the pastry-wrapped roast
raw beetroots and turnips with leafy tops on a wooden chopping board — raw root vegetables, not the assembled salad
Belgian-style waffles with chocolate sauce, ice cream, berries and sprinkles — waffles are the dominant element
scattered jar of frozen and dried berries with leaves on white surface — ingredient flat-lay, not the blended smoothie drink
bunch of whole yellow bananas on white surface — raw fruit ingredient shot, not the cake
pile of butter cubes on flour — generic baking-ingredient shot, completely wrong dish
raw cauliflower florets on a wooden board next to an empty baking tray with parchment — prep shot, not the cooked gratin
handwritten manuscript text — completely off-topic, no food in image
bowl of crispy roasted kale chips — correct dish
stack of glazed cinnamon rolls on a teal surface — correct dish
raw pork belly and pork shoulder cuts on a wooden board with potato and leek — ingredient shot, not the cooked Polish hunters' stew
bowl of muesli with yogurt and fresh berries (raspberry, blackberry, strawberry) — correct bircher-style dish
glass jar of almond biscotti slices held in a hand — correct dish, almonds clearly visible in the biscuits
plate of American buttermilk biscuits topped with creamy peppered sausage gravy — correct dish
jar of dark blackberry jam with a spoon — correct dish
raw pork cuts (belly, shoulder, chops) on a wooden board — ingredient shot, not the creamy French veal stew
French bistro window with painted lettering reading 'Service non stop / Soupe à l'oignon / Escargots de Bourgogne / Boeuf bourguignon' — restaurant signage only, no actual dish visible
chocolate sandwich biscuits with cream filling on a slate board with tea — image is the biscuit base ingredient, not the cheesecake
bowl of red borscht with a dollop of sour cream, parsley garnish, and rye bread on the side — correct dish
jam-filled sandwich biscuits on a saucer with a cup of tea — bourbon biscuits are dark chocolate sandwich biscuits with chocolate cream, this is the wrong biscuit type

composition with bowls of borscht and minestrone soup plus a jar of pickled cucumbers on the side and bread slices — pickles are present but not the dominant subject, and the soup bowls steal the frame
